summary: Source-of-truth inventory for existing memory-residency surfaces, proof ownership, overlap boundaries, and the fail-closed rules required before any opt-in residency control loop is added.

global_no_claim_boundaries.statement: This inventory does not prove broad workspace health, all-target health, clippy health, or release readiness.
This inventory is not a release gate and does not claim the crate is ready to publish.
This inventory does not claim a universal allocator strategy, allocator replacement, or production-on-by-default residency behavior.
This inventory does not prove throughput improvement, p999 improvement, memory reduction, NUMA win, or cache warmth benefit.
This inventory grants no permission to delete files, clean worktrees, create branches, or create worktrees.
Cargo proof commands for this lane require RCH and no local Cargo fallback.
This inventory does not change default runtime behavior, admission policy, cache eviction policy, or scheduler selection.

validation_policy.mapped_gap_policy: Rows in source_gap_rows are intentionally not claim rows. They must name source files, a next child bead, required work before claim, and no-claim boundaries.

claim_rows.supported_claim: RuntimeCapacityHints and trace storage profile fixtures define deterministic capacity and burst-allocation accounting used by later residency policy work.
proof_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_runtime_capacity_hints_contract CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test runtime_capacity_hints_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
no_claim_boundaries: Does not prove scheduler throughput, allocator replacement, NUMA locality, or release readiness.
Does not change default RuntimeConfig behavior.

claim_rows.supported_claim: The existing slab/pool certification maps hot runtime records, warm capacity/locality plans, cold evidence artifacts, and safe heap fallback rows.
proof_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_memory_tier_slab_pool_contract CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test memory_tier_slab_pool_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
no_claim_boundaries: Does not prove a new allocator, default production tiering, large-page availability, or release readiness.
Does not replace the asupersync-h6pjqb certification.

claim_rows.supported_claim: Hot/cold arena tier fixtures and smoke reports define deterministic operator-visible tiering and fallback behavior for 64-core/256-GiB style scenarios.
proof_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_hot_cold_arena_tiers_contract CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test hot_cold_arena_tiers --features test-internals -- --nocapture
no_claim_boundaries: Does not prove real-host memory savings, p999 improvement, large-page support, or production-on-by-default tiering.
Dry-run reports remain operator evidence, not allocator correctness evidence.

claim_rows.supported_claim: NUMA arena locality fixtures define deterministic cohort-pinning, low-confidence fallback, no-win fallback, and real-host template evidence.
proof_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_numa_arena_locality_contract CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test numa_arena_locality_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
no_claim_boundaries: Does not prove host NUMA topology is present, a locality win exists, or a broad scheduler performance improvement.
The real-host template is not a substitute for fresh host evidence.

claim_rows.supported_claim: Proof-pack warmth planning can classify warm workers and emit isolated dry-run command templates without treating cache warmth as correctness evidence.
proof_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_pack_warmth_planner_contract CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_pack_warmth_planner_contract -- --nocapture
no_claim_boundaries: Cache warmth is not correctness evidence.
Does not prove RCH fleet availability, proof pass/fail outcome, or release readiness.

claim_rows.supported_claim: Runtime pressure evidence records source schema versions, memory-budget pressure rows, RCH proof-lane pressure rows, no-local-fallback evidence, and operator diagnostics boundaries.
proof_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_runtime_pressure_control_evidence_contract CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test runtime_pressure_control_evidence_contract -- --nocapture
no_claim_boundaries: Does not prove autonomous admission/backpressure behavior, real-host throughput, scheduler regression closure, or RCH fleet health.
Does not make pressure control production-on-by-default.

claim_rows.supported_claim: The scheduler swarm memory-residency policy artifact defines deterministic request, plan, stale-metrics, empty-budget, and contradictory-policy fixtures.
proof_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_scheduler_swarm_memory_residency cargo test -p asupersync --test scheduler_swarm_evidence_artifact swarm_memory_residency --features test-internals -- --nocapture
no_claim_boundaries: Does not prove a general runtime memory-residency controller.
Does not supersede fourth-wave governance, validation-frontier signoff, or AppSpec surfaces.

source_gap_rows.why_not_claimed: ArtifactMemoryPressureSnapshot and ArtifactCache expose useful pressure accounting, but this inventory does not create a dedicated residency policy, artifact contract, or RCH proof lane for cache eviction decisions.
required_before_claim: Add a checked artifact that owns hot/warm/cold cache accounting semantics.
Add a focused contract test that verifies deterministic snapshot rows and fail-closed eviction boundaries.
Wire the row into M3 live accounting before claiming residency control behavior.
no_claim_boundaries: No cache eviction policy change is claimed.
No memory reduction, cache hit-rate win, or proof-pack correctness claim is made.

overlap_decisions.rationale: M1 treats the memory-tier slab/pool contract as existing substrate. Later M2/M3 work must extend from this inventory instead of rewriting the h6pjqb certificate.
M1 records memory-residency evidence only. It does not claim scheduler hot-path improvement or touch dirty benchmark files.
Fourth-wave governance remains the operator signoff surface for pressure-governor evidence. M1 only inventories memory-residency source ownership and no-claim boundaries.
Validation-frontier rows explain how to interpret proof-lane evidence. M1 does not claim broad workspace health, release readiness, runtime correctness, or local Cargo fallback approval.
AppSpec/API surface work owns public API shape. M1 does not expose new API, change runtime defaults, or alter API surface maps.

inventory_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_memory_residency_inventory_contract CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test memory_residency_inventory_contract -- --nocapture

focused_proof.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_memory_residency_inventory_contract CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test memory_residency_inventory_contract -- --nocapture
focused_proof.covers: Inventory schema, source/test/artifact path existence, unique claim owners, required overlap decisions, RCH-only proof command shape, mapped gap boundaries, and docs alignment.
focused_proof.explicit_not_covered: Does not prove runtime correctness, release readiness, performance improvement, allocator replacement, live RCH fleet availability, cache eviction behavior, or default runtime behavior.
